script: TENANT=50186224-2255-444a-b321-60a84114115c; for B in neil-claude stephanie-claude; do echo "========== Cleaning $B secret =========="; APP=$(grep -oE '[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}' /home/azureuser/${B}-responder.py | head -1); MESSY=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name ${B}-bot-client-secret --query value -o tsv); CLEAN=$(printf '%s' "$MESSY" | tail -n 1); echo "  ${#MESSY} -> ${#CLEAN}"; RESP=$(curl -s -X POST "https://login.microsoftonline.com/$TENANT/oauth2/v2.0/token" --data-urlencode "client_id=$APP" --data-urlencode "client_secret=$CLEAN" --data-urlencode 'grant_type=client_credentials' --data-urlencode 'scope=https://api.botframework.com/.default'); HAS=$(echo "$RESP" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print("yes" if json.load(sys.stdin).get("access_token") else "no")'); echo "  test_token=$HAS"; if [ "$HAS" = "yes" ]; then printf '%s' "$CLEAN" | az keyvault secret set --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name ${B}-bot-client-secret --file /dev/stdin -o none && echo '  vault updated'; sudo systemctl restart ${B}-bot.service ${B}-responder.service 2>/dev/null && echo '  services restarted' || echo '  RESTART FAILED'; else echo '  >>> CLEAN candidate failed — NOT writing'; fi; echo; done; echo '========== Emily diagnostic — why is she not replying? =========='; echo '----- Last 20 lines of responder-debug.log -----'; tail -20 /home/azureuser/.emily-claude-bot/responder-debug.log 2>/dev/null; echo; echo '----- responder-errors.log (full) -----'; cat /home/azureuser/.emily-claude-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null; echo; echo '----- Recent Emily outbound (after URL fix) -----'; if [ -f /home/azureuser/.emily-claude-bot/outbound.jsonl ]; then wc -l /home/azureuser/.emily-claude-bot/outbound.jsonl; else echo '  (no outbound yet)'; fi; echo; echo '----- Emily responder-offset.txt (which entries processed) -----'; cat /home/azureuser/.emily-claude-bot/responder-offset.txt 2>/dev/null
